name: Text Helper
description: LLM-powered text utilities in Ruby. Summarize, extract key points, analyze sentiment, explain meaning, or perform reasoned analysis on any text — using OpenAI or a local LM Studio model.

tools.name: key_points
tools.description: Extract the most important key points from text.

text.description: The text to extract key points from.

tools.name: sentiment
tools.description: Analyze the sentiment of text — tone, mood, and intent.

tools.name: explain
tools.description: Explain the meaning and context of text, including implied conclusions or recommendations.

tools.name: reason
tools.description: Perform a reasoned analysis of text and surface insights or next steps.
